headline: Is HP (HPQ) Offering Value After Its Prolonged Share Price Decline
summary: Wondering whether HP's current share price reflects its real worth, or if the market is mispricing it based on the fundamentals you care about most. HP's share price recently closed at US$18.26, with returns of a 6.4% decline over 7 days, a 3.5% decline over 30 days, and a 17.5% decline year to date, adding to an 18.2% decline over 1 year, a 31.0% decline over 3 years, and a 35.7% decline over 5 years. These moves have kept HP on many investors' watchlists, as sustained share price weakness...
